positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial forest scene, highly detailed and intricate. The composition features massive, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna rooted in an ethereal, deep blue landscape. A central, majestic creature—a stylized winged guardian resembling a mix of phoenix and aurora borealis—is dramatically ascending through the canopy. The overall style is high-contrast, neo-art deco fantasy, rendered with sharp linework and jewel-toned color gradients (deep sapphire, glowing teal, vivid magenta, and gold highlights). Strong silhouette elements are key. The lighting is cinematic, emanating primarily from the magical flora, creating deep, contrasting shadows and brilliant highlights. Ideal for a central, repeat apparel print.
negative: blurry, out of focus, artifacts, grain, text, watermark, low resolution, poor anatomy, ugly, amateur, noise, extra limbs, deformed
